title: A film review
explanation:
A film review

Star Journey — ★★★★☆

This new science-fiction film tells the story of a pilot who discovers a new planet. The special effects are amazing and the music is beautiful. Some people think the story is too slow in the middle, but the ending is exciting. I recommend it to anyone who loves space films. Running time: two hours and ten minutes. Certificate: 12A.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The film is called [*Star Journey|Star Wars|Space Pilot].
The reviewer gives [*four|five|two] stars out of five.
The film lasts [*2 hours 10 minutes|90 minutes|3 hours].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Read and choose the correct option.

questions.text: The special effects are ____. | *amazing | slow | boring
Some people think the story is too ____ in the middle. | *slow | short | loud
The reviewer ____ the film. | *recommends | hates | ignores

exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.
